title: SeaweedFS 4.x single-master installs report zero Raft peers in /cluster/status
details: Single-replica master clusters often omit Peers in status JSON; rely on IsLeader and /cluster/healthz instead of peer count alone.
next_steps: Use HA master replicas (>1) for production; ignore zero-peer status on single-node dev installs.

title: Dedicated S3 deployment may not expose S3 on filer port 8333
details: Official Helm chart can run S3 as a separate Deployment; probes must target the s3 component pod or rw-seaweedfs-s3 service, not the filer.
next_steps: Confirm app.kubernetes.io/component=s3 exists or enable filer.s3 on the filer StatefulSet.

title: Review SeaweedFS 4.25+ before upgrade from 4.24.x
details: Minor chart/app upgrades may change default volume growth, metrics names, and filer store defaults.
next_steps: Read SeaweedFS release notes and Helm chart changelog before upgrading past 4.24.x.

title: SeaweedFS 3.x is outside the chart version validated by this bundle
details: Health probes and /dir/status layout fields differ on older 3.x releases.
next_steps: Upgrade to SeaweedFS 4.x chart or validate APIs manually before trusting automated checks.
